name: Trend Detector
tagline: Know what to build every morning
description: Private pipeline. Pulls rising search trends every morning, scores them against what's buildable in 48 hours, and outputs BUILD/WATCH/SKIP decisions.
bullets: Runs at 9AM daily via Task Scheduler — no input required
Three sources cross-referenced: Google Trends API, RSS, and newsletter
Scores each keyword 0-100: growth velocity, buildability, volume, freshness
Reddit pain signal validation — confirms real frustration before flagging a build
Two-pass competitor check — raw keyword first, then the specific product idea
BUILD/WATCH/SKIP decisions with lifecycle tags: EARLY, PEAKING, or FADING
